blockedReasons.label: Escalations to sign
blockedReasons.explanation: Escalation is consequential and can never be auto-cleared or auto-filed.

blockedReasons.label: Adversarial debate
blockedReasons.explanation: The agents contested the call; contested alerts are firewalled from auto-clear.

nextActions.label: Sign escalation-ready cases
nextActions.rationale: Consequential cases stay human-gated; clear these first for filing SLA and compliance review.

nextActions.label: Resolve challenged decisions
nextActions.rationale: Verifier, screening, debate, or network-revocation controls challenged the automation path.

nextActions.label: Spot-check cleared lane
nextActions.rationale: The agent removed benign noise, but sampled clears remain inspectable for leakage control.

summary: We processed 25 alerts overnight. 3 were auto-cleared as high-confidence, verifier-agreed benign dismissals. The remaining 22 were routed to human review, including 19 escalations to sign and 2 flagged for judgment.
